object_a.label: other
object_a.description: tiny dark speck or stain on beige surface
object_a.long_form_open_description: A small dark dot or speck is visible in the lower-left quadrant of the frame on the beige surface. It is tiny (a few pixels) and could be a small stain, dirt speck, or camera artifact. No distinguishing shape or text.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located on the beige surface, lower-left area, well below the top white trim element.

object_b.label: stairs
object_b.description: carpeted staircase with decorative white balusters and wooden handrail
object_b.long_form_open_description: A carpeted staircase begins at the left foreground with white turned balusters and a medium-brown wooden handrail/newel post. The balustrade runs upward and back toward the center of the image. The carpet is a neutral beige, and the wood shows a polished finish.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly left of the foreground; the base of the stairs is beside the left end of the couch and under framed pictures on the wall
object_b.object_text_short: carpeted staircase with decorative white balusters and wooden handrail
